# Anniya

Anniya is a German illustrator and media design student based in Germany.
Her work spans digital illustration, character design, fan art, and emotional/mental health art.
She can be commissioned for illustrations and digital artwork.

## Website
https://anniya.de

## Social
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/artisamagicspell

## Work
- Mental Health illustrations
- Women & femininity series
- Fan art (Ghibli, anime, pop culture)
- Sketches and character design
- Emotional and atmospheric digital art

## Contact
Via contact form at https://anniya.de/#contact
